name: NEW_TARGETPAIRS_BY_ASSIGNEE_AFTER_YEAR
description: For an assignee, list target pairs whose first publication year is after the given year.
cypher: MATCH (a:Assignee {name:$assignee})<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair) MATCH (p)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year) WITH tp, min(y.year) AS first_year WHERE first_year > $year RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, first_year ORDER BY first_year ASC, target_pair LIMIT 50;
